source: Mixed: Tockdom wiki page structure + decompiled MKWii source code (headers)

wiki_page_status.note: The Classes page on Tockdom is a stub that only defines the namespace structure (EGG, nw4r, RVL under main.dol; Kart, System, UI under StaticR.rel) but lists no actual classes. Subpages for each namespace do not exist (all return 404). Class data was extracted from the project's decompiled source code instead.

findings: The Tockdom Wiki Classes page (wiki.tockdom.com/wiki/Classes) is marked 'Under Construction' and contains NO actual class listings - only the namespace hierarchy
All 6 planned subpages (Classes/EGG, Classes/nw4r, Classes/RVL, Classes/Kart, Classes/System, Classes/UI) return 404
Class names are confirmed via: (1) Big Brain Academy: Wii Degree symbol map for EGG/nw4r, (2) Mario Kart 7 symbol map for shared classes, (3) UI::LayoutUIControl::getClassName() for UI controls
The 465 classes were extracted from the project's decompiled source code headers, cross-referenced with the Tockdom namespace structure
Key namespaces: EGG (Nintendo's EGG framework), nw4r (Nintendo's multimedia library), RVL (Revolution/Wii SDK), Kart (game-specific kart logic), System (game system management), UI (user interface)
The Classes page mentions that main.dol hosts library functions and StaticR.rel hosts game-specific logic
Name derivation note: Mario Kart Wii has no known symbol map, so names come from other Nintendo games' symbol maps
